title: Oil surpasses $98 and European gas nears highs due to geopolitical tensions
summary: Crude oil surges after Houthi attack on Saudi tankers and natural gas rises amid fears of a winter with scarce supply, fueling inflationary concerns in Europe.

title: Repsol triples its profit in the first half and announces share buyback
summary: The Spanish oil company earned 2.2 billion euros between January and June, driven by rising crude prices and increased production, and plans to buy back up to 500 million euros in shares.

title: Nestlé restructures its water business with a joint venture and possible sale of Perrier
summary: The Swiss company creates an alliance valued at 4.9 billion euros in the water sector and negotiates the divestment of its stake in the Perrier brand, while its results disappoint the market.

title: Asian stock markets rebound driven by semiconductor and artificial intelligence sector
summary: The Nikkei and Kospi advance strongly thanks to the pull of technology and chip stocks, fueled by the US SOX rally and optimism surrounding AI.

title: Ibex 35 edges down in a session marked by corporate results and wait for ECB
summary: The Spanish benchmark moves around 19,500 points with moderate declines, as investors digest half-yearly earnings and anticipate the European Central Bank's decision.

title: Wall Street closes flat awaiting new stimulus
summary: The main US indices ended the session barely changed, with the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq practically stable.

title: European bond yields rise ahead of imminent ECB meeting
summary: The ten-year German bond yield climbed to 3.2% as the market prices in a possible rate hike by the European Central Bank.
